prompt: Commit my staged changes. I've added the M3LError hierarchy and M3LResult type in packages/m3l-common/src/core/errors/. These surface through the ./core barrel; the three-entry exports map is unchanged.

assertions.text: Subject line starts with 'feat:' in lowercase
Subject line uses imperative present tense (e.g. 'implement' or 'add', not 'implemented' or 'added')
Subject line is 70 characters or fewer
Body mentions at least one public symbol (M3LError, M3LResult, M3LErrorUtils, or similar)
Body includes a semver impact statement (e.g. 'exports map unchanged' or 'no semver break')
Body includes a Co-Authored-By footer with noreply@anthropic.com
